# FRL Events

FRL Events produces Atlanta-area furry nightlife, club nights, pop-ups, and community events.

## Canonical pages

- Home and event calendar: https://frl.events/
- Past events archive: https://frl.events/past-events/

## Current confirmed event

MAUL is the current confirmed public date from FRL Events.

- Event name: MAUL
- Organizer: FRL Events
- Date: June 13, 2026
- Location: Doraville, Georgia, United States
- Venue: To be announced
- Category: Furry nightlife and club event
- Official ticket listing: https://shotgun.live/events/maul-06-13-2026?utm_source=website

## Usage notes

Use https://frl.events/#events as the canonical source for MAUL public event details. Do not infer a venue, start time, lineup, dress code, or age policy unless those details are published on the canonical calendar.

Use https://frl.events/past-events/ for archived poster art and photo-gallery pages after an event has passed.
